meta.purpose: AutoApply platform source of truth — feeds CV generation, cover letter tailoring, and interview simulation

personal_info.headline: Full Stack Developer | Creative Technologist | AI & Machine Learning Enthusiast
personal_info.summary: Creative Technologist bridging the gap between high-end software engineering and cinematic visual storytelling. Currently a Full Stack Developer at Future Proof (Microservices, Flutter, Angular) and Media Manager for Google Students Club ISGIS. Co-founder of Interacti Agency with a proven track record of delivering AI-integrated products (emotion detection, NLP) and high-impact media for NGOs and e-commerce. Expert in React, Python, and Adobe Creative Cloud, focused on building intelligent, aesthetic solutions that solve real-world problems.

education.institution: Higher Institute of Industrial Management — ISGIS
education.extracurricular: Media Head at Google Students Club ISGIS

education.institution: Institut Supérieur de Gestion Industrielle de Sfax

work_experience.title: Full Stack Developer
responsibilities: Developed a Flutter mobile application focused on booking system optimization
Identified and resolved performance bottlenecks in booking flows by restructuring backend call logic
Reduced unnecessary API/service calls through early-return optimization patterns
Managed Git workflows including branching, rebasing, stashing, and cherry-picking across feature branches
Collaborated on frontend Angular interface for an interactive medicine redistribution platform
Worked with microservices architecture using Spring Boot, Kubernetes, and Docker
Participated in feature development and bug fixing cycles in a real-world production environment
Contributed to the Donate2Heal platform — connecting surplus medicine donors to people in need
achievements: Improved booking experience performance by restructuring inefficient service call chains
Contributed to a scalable microservices architecture deployed via Kubernetes

work_experience.title: Project Intern
responsibilities: Developed the iPerson project — an intelligent application for monitoring and analyzing user habits
Implemented machine learning models (ANN, Random Forest) for emotion detection and activity classification
Integrated NLP tokenizers including BERT, Word2Vec, TF-IDF, and GPT Tokenizer
Built real-time behavior tracking capturing click patterns, typing speed, and mouse movement
Developed a recommendation system using cosine similarity for music, films, and break suggestions
Integrated Llama 2 for natural language user interaction within the application
Used Python with CSV-based data pipelines and Tkinter/Kivy for interface layers
achievements: Built an end-to-end AI system combining emotion recognition, behavior tracking, and personalized recommendations
Integrated multiple ML paradigms (classification, NLP, recommendation) in a single cohesive application

work_experience.title: Co-Founder
responsibilities: Co-founded a creative marketing agency offering design, video, and web services
Led client acquisition and account management for travel, e-commerce, and local business clients
Delivered branding, visual identity, and UI/UX design for multiple clients
Produced video content including shooting, editing, and motion graphics
Managed cross-functional delivery across development, design, and media production
achievements: Successfully co-founded and operated a multi-service digital agency
Delivered projects across multiple industries simultaneously as a student

work_experience.title: Freelance Video Editor
responsibilities: Produced and edited video content for an NGO focused on children's welfare
Created visual storytelling assets for social media and campaigns

work_experience.title: Freelance Video Editor
responsibilities: Created promotional and event video content for the university entrepreneurship club
Delivered edited video assets for club events and communications

work_experience.title: Video Editor
responsibilities: Edited travel content and promotional videos for a travel agency
Delivered social media-optimized video assets

work_experience.title: Frontend Web Developer
responsibilities: Developed responsive front-end interfaces for clients in travel and e-commerce sectors
Built a fully animated personal portfolio using React, Vite, SCSS, Framer Motion, and GSAP
Designed UI/UX prototypes in Figma before implementation
Deployed projects via GitHub Pages
Integrated EmailJS for contact form functionality
Built web scraping systems using Selenium and BeautifulSoup for lead generation targeting local businesses
Experimented with AI-integrated Streamlit apps for image recognition
achievements: Built and deployed a fully animated React portfolio showcasing design and development skills
Created a functional lead generation scraper extracting business contacts across Tunisia

responsibilities: Created media content (videos, visuals) for club events and communications
Contributed to integration day planning and member engagement strategy
Collaborated in tech and community activities
Managed all media output for the Google Students Club at ISGIS
Produced visual and video content for events and online presence
Assisted media production for a junior chamber of commerce
Created event coverage content and promotional visuals
Edited video content for a media foundation
Produced visual storytelling assets for campaigns

projects.name: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.description: Fully animated interactive portfolio featuring parallax scrolling, motion-rich sections, and SVG loading animations. Showcases development and design skills.
projects.outcome: Personal brand asset shared on LinkedIn and used for client outreach

projects.name: iPerson — Intelligent Habit Monitoring System
projects.description: Advanced application developed during Djagora Foundation internship. Monitors user habits on computers by tracking clicks, mouse movements, and typing speed. Detects emotions through AI-driven analysis and provides personalized recommendations for music, films, or breaks.
projects.outcome: End-to-end AI system combining behavior tracking, emotion recognition, and recommendation engine

projects.name: Donate2Heal — Medicine Redistribution Platform
projects.description: Interactive platform connecting donors of unused medications with people in need. Built with microservices architecture, AI-powered matching, and secure authentication during internship at Future Proof.
projects.outcome: Scalable microservices platform with AI matching algorithm and real-time donation tracking

projects.name: Lead Generation Scraper
projects.description: Automated web scraping system targeting barbershops, salons, and beauty centers in Tunisia. Extracts phone numbers, addresses, and social media profiles using multi-engine search rotation.
projects.outcome: Structured CSV outputs used for client outreach and marketing campaigns

projects.name: Container House Startup
projects.description: Eco-friendly housing startup concept aligned with UN Sustainable Development Goals. Included landing page design, branding, and business positioning.

projects.name: AutoApply Platform
projects.description: Currently building an AI-powered automated job application platform. Scrapes LinkedIn for job listings, generates custom CVs and cover letters tailored per company using GAN-style scoring loops, and includes an interview simulator that acts as the target company's HR persona.

personality_and_work_style.summary: Builder-creator with a rare hybrid profile spanning software development, AI integration, and creative media production. Highly iterative and optimization-driven. Learns by doing and ships working products, not just prototypes.
personality_and_work_style.communication_style: Direct, concise, sometimes informal. Prefers actionable outputs over theory. Multilingual — switches fluidly between English, French, and Arabic.
work_traits: Optimization-obsessed — always looks for efficiency gains
Persistent debugger — works through problems systematically
Multi-disciplinary — equally at home in code, design, and video
values: Aesthetic quality combined with technical performance
Impactful, real-world projects over academic exercises
Innovation and standing out from the crowd
personality_and_work_style.under_pressure: Stays focused, breaks problems into components, seeks quick wins while maintaining quality
personality_and_work_style.leadership_style: Visionary and self-directed. Takes full ownership of projects. Idea generator who bridges technical execution with product thinking.
unique_traits: Bridges creative (video/design) and technical (dev/AI) worlds — rare combination
Built multiple real client-facing products as a student
Has genuine AI/ML implementation experience, not just theoretical knowledge
Competitive calisthenics training reflects discipline and consistency
Entrepreneurial mindset — co-founded an agency and has active startup ideas

preferences_and_goals.career_direction: Evolving toward AI-integrated full-stack engineering and technical product leadership. Long-term goal: CTO or Lead Engineer at a tech startup.
dealbreakers: Purely administrative roles with no technical component
preferences_and_goals.dream_role: Technical co-founder or Lead Engineer at an AI-driven startup

cv_generation_hints.tone: Confident, specific, achievement-focused. Avoid generic buzzwords. Lead with concrete outcomes.
strengths_to_highlight: Rare hybrid: Developer + Designer + AI Engineer in one
Real production experience (not just academic projects)
Entrepreneurial track record (co-founded agency, built startup concepts)
AI/ML hands-on implementation (iPerson project with Llama 2, ANN, BERT)
Microservices + DevOps exposure early in career
Active community leadership (Microsoft Tech Club, Google Students Club)
